channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ukraine's potential missile manufacturing deal with US faces production hurdles and geopolitical complexities
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a proposal to grant Ukraine the capability to manufacture Patriot interceptor missiles, a critical defense asset against Russian attacks. While this move could ...

item.title: Government rescues 160 trafficking victims, 57 arrested in anti-trafficking efforts
item.description: The Tanzanian government has rescued 160 citizens trafficked for illegal and exploitative labor, including sexual exploitation, between July 2025 and February 2026. The victims comprised 96 women, fou...

item.title: Mike Collins Faces Staff Shake-Up and Criticism Amid Senate Race
item.description: U.S. Senator Mike Collins (R-GA) is experiencing a significant staff shake-up as he loses his second congressional chief of staff, forcing him to open a third hiring process. According to The Atlanta ...

item.title: Teen Rider Arrested After Attempting to Escape Police in E-Motorcycle Pursuit
item.description: A 15-year-old boy on an electric motorcycle attempted to evade police in downtown Palm Springs by performing dangerous stunts such as wheelies and doughnuts, according to authorities. The incident occ...

item.title: Police Warn Against Unlawful Phone Searches Without Warrant
item.description: The Police Command in Plateau state has issued stern warnings to its officers against unlawfully searching citizens' mobile phones without a court-issued warrant. Commissioner Mr Bassey Ewah emphasize...

item.title: A couple's emotional strain and the decision to separate
item.description: The article explores the dilemma of a woman deeply conflicted about whether to end her 20-year marriage to her husband, who struggles with untreated ADHD and PTSD. She feels emotionally drained from s...

item.title: PBO chief criticises government budget optimism and transparency flaws
item.description: The head of Australia's Parliamentary Budget Office, Sam Reinhardt, has publicly criticised the government's approach to budgeting, highlighting a systemic bias towards optimistic fiscal projections. ...

item.title: Shopify President Faces Third Anti-Israel Protest at Tech Conference
item.description: Harley Finkelstein, presidente de Shopify, nuevamente fue confrontado por un activista antisionista durante una conferencia tecnológica en Montreal. Este incidente marca el tercero en dos años que Fin...

item.title: PS Plus August 2026 Game Lineup: Key Titles and Release Dates Revealed
item.description: The PlayStation Plus service for August 2026 has confirmed a selection of games across its Essential, Extra, and Premium tiers. The month's highlights include the exclusive release of 'Big Walk' on PS...

item.title: ED chargesheets former Punjab minister Sanjeev Arora over alleged Rs 103 crore fake iPhone export and money laundering case
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has filed a prosecution complaint (chargesheet) against former Punjab cabinet minister and AAP leader Sanjeev Arora, alleging that he was the key conspirator in a fake...

item.title: France Advances to World Cup Semi-Finals with 2-0 Win Over Morocco
item.description: In a decisive quarter-final clash at Boston Stadium in Foxborough, France secured their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-finals with a commanding 2-0 victory over Morocco. The match, played on Th...

item.title: RCMP acknowledges investigation into CBSA officer's alleged ties to Dhanda drug network
item.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) has confirmed awareness of an allegation that a Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA) employee provided information to the Dhanda drug trafficking ring to facil...

item.title: Venezuela's Earthquakes Claim Over 3,800 Lives, Over 17,000 Injured
item.description: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela on June 24, 2026, causing widespread destruction and loss of life. The death toll has risen to at least 3,889, with over 17,000 people injured and nearly 18,0...

item.title: Former Afghan ally dies in ICE custody as accident ruling sparks family concerns
item.description: The death of Naseer Paktiawal, a former Afghan ally detained by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), has raised significant questions among his family and advocates. Initially reported as a...

item.title: Four Nationals Return to India After One-Year Legal Battle Following Illegal Pushback from Bangladesh
item.description: Four Indian nationals, including two minors, who were detained by Delhi Police in 2025 and illegally pushed into Bangladesh, have returned to India after a year-long legal battle. The group, comprisin...

item.title: WIRED Presents Documentary on Longevity and Aging at Cemetery Screening
item.description: The article announces a special film screening of 'The Oldest Person in the World,' a documentary directed by Oscar nominee Sam Green, as part of WIRED@NIGHT02. The film explores the global journey of...

item.title: Real Housewives Stars Face Backlash Over MAGA Ties and Anti-LGBTQ Posts
item.description: Stars of 'The Real Housewives of Rhode Island' faced backlash after Reddit users uncovered their connections to MAGA-aligned content and anti-LGBTQ posts. Jo-Ellen Tiberi, Alicia Carmody, and Rulla Ne...

item.title: Tanzania hosts global conference to address Africa’s freshwater crisis
item.description: Tanzania is set to host the 21st World Lake Conference in Mwanza, bringing together global experts to tackle Africa's growing water challenges. The event aims to address critical threats like climate ...

item.title: Ghana and South Africa's diplomatic rift over migration tensions
item.description: The planned visit by South African President Cyril Ramaphosa to Ghana has been postponed due to diplomatic tensions sparked by anti-foreigner protests in South Africa. The delay highlights how domesti...

item.title: Typhoon Bavi Threatens China and Taiwan with Potential Catastrophic Damage
item.description: Typhoon Bavi, with winds approaching 200 kph (124 mph), is set to become one of the most destructive storms in recent years, threatening both China and Taiwan. The storm, spanning about 1,000 km (621 ...
